title: refactor(gen-image): remove dead code and dedupe image model handlers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Delete never-imported dead modules: `matureWords.ts` (581 lines), `utils/mature.ts`, `promptEnhancer.ts` (identity no-op) + the dead enhance/translation/`pimpPrompt` path
- Drop dead `wasPimped`/`timingInfo`/`TimingStep` plumbing, unused `logError` consts, and the two no-op `ProgressManager` methods
- Collapse 12 redundant log-and-rethrow `catch` blocks in the `generateImage` switch — errors are already mapped centrally in handler.ts (kept the 3 gpt-image error logs)
- Remove speculative `concurrentRequests`/`countFluxJobs` plumbing (logged, never used)
- Factor duplicated DashScope multimodal call and xAI aspect-ratio table into two small shared helpers

Verified non-breaking: biome clean, affected tests green vs the main baseline. Net −915 lines.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Trimming the digital hedges
gist.blurb: We just swept away nearly a thousand lines of unused code from our image generation backend. A lighter, cleaner codebase means faster development and fewer bugs hiding in the weeds.
gist.summary: Removed 915 lines of dead code and duplicated logic from the image generation backend, including unused prompt enhancement paths and redundant error handlers.
gist.impact: Developers benefit from a cleaner, more maintainable codebase with centralized error mapping and shared helpers for DashScope and xAI models.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old code/documents, or Polly the bee sweeping up dead leaves/code snippets. Since it's dead code removal, Nomnom eating deprecated code snippets fits perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan nomnom creature happily eating a pile of dusty, deprecated code printouts while the bee mascot sweeps up with a tiny broom. A retro terminal nearby glows lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.
